import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split(text, "\n")
let n = list.len(parts)
mut last = n
if n > 0
  match list.get(parts, n - 1)
  when Some(s)
    if string.is_empty(s)
      last = n - 1
    end
  when None
    last = n
  end
end
mut i = 0
while i < last
  match list.get(parts, i)
  when Some(line)
    println("[#{i}] #{line}")
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
